title: Rename device - Rename, max chars
scenario: Device name field in Device Settings > General accepts up to 30 bytes (30 English characters) for renaming
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
On the Home screen, tap the device name or gear icon to navigate to Device Settings.
Tap on the device's official name field to edit it.
Enter exactly 30 bytes (30 English characters) for the new device name.
Tap Done to save the name.
Verify the device name is updated and displayed correctly on the Home screen and in Device Settings.
expected: The device's name is changed successfully and displays the full 30-character name on the Home screen and in Device Settings.
